zh: 管教的範圍一般只注意到外顯的行為、
en: Discipline often focuses only on outward behavior,

zh: 例如清潔的習慣、物品的整理。
en: like cleanliness habits or tidying belongings.

zh: 其實、尤應建立孩子的對錯判斷、賞罰分明、
en: Yet what matters most is building their sense of right and wrong, with clear rewards and consequences.

zh: 會給孩子美滿幸福的感覺、
en: all give a child a feeling of complete happiness,
and that is the greatest reward of all.
